case_title: WILLIAM XIE VS. NEGRON RICARDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-20-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CEMEX INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIE, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RICARDO, NEGRON CEMEX INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF XIE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CEMEX INC.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,986.47 FILED BY XIE, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT RICARDO, NEGRON CEMEX INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CEMEX INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRIS CLIFFORD--AREA MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER---ALBERT HAO. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.
